The only thing that can stop him is a Democratic candidate with a strong team behind them -- I'm counting on you to be a part of that team.

body:
#
I have three very important facts for you to know today.
* There are **27 primaries and caucuses between now andJune 7, which is the day we expect to overtake Hillary Clinton's campaign** in pledged delegates needed to win the nomination.

* In the next 7 days, the Clinton campaign is hosting 7 fundraisers where some **high-dollar donors will bundle at least $27,000 each.**

* The average contribution to our campaign is **just $27.**

I think you know what I'm about to ask you to do.
[**Please contribute $27 to our political revolution so we can win the Democratic nomination, the White House, and take our country back from the billionaire class.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/twenty-seven-dollars?refcode=em160316&amount=27 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/twenty-seven-dollars?refcode=em160316&amount=27")
**[Contribute $27](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/twenty-seven-dollars?refcode=em160316&amount=27 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/twenty-seven-dollars?refcode=em160316&amount=27")**
As Bernie wrote to you earlier, it's important to know that today is the high water mark for the Clinton campaign. The primaries and caucuses ahead of us represent big chances for us to win. Starting today, the map now shifts dramatically in our favor.
Arizona, Idaho, and Utah are up next Tuesday. Alaska, Hawaii, and Washington State caucus the Saturday after. Then it's Wisconsin's turn to vote.
**We think we have a great shot at winning _every single state_ that votes in the next month**. But we can only be that successful if you're still with us tonight.
[**Make a $27 contribution to our campaign now and show the billionaire class that they can't have it all.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/twenty-seven-dollars?refcode=em160316&amount=27 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/twenty-seven-dollars?refcode=em160316&amount=27")
Your support for Bernie now means that we can keep fighting for our political revolution. Thank you for being a part of this.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

name: Rand Paul
subject: Let's save jobs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Patriot,

The most devastating thing President Obama
has done to Kentucky is his war on coal.
And Hillary Clinton? She wants to continue
that legacy.
She's not even shy about it.
Just this weekend at a rally she was caught
saying "we're going to put coal miners, and coal companies, out
of business."
I will not let that happen. I will stand
strong for Kentucky coal, every step of the way.

Will you sign my
petition to end the liberal war on coal?

The real problem here is that liberals like
Hillary and President Obama want to abuse their authority, and
the authority of the executive branch, to choose winners and
losers in business.
Through executive order and through the EPA,
our coal industry has faced a major onslaught of regulation. It
has not only been a war against one of our leading industries,
but this has literally been a war on Kentucky jobs.
Ten thousand workers have lost their jobs
because of President Obama's malicious disregard for Kentucky.
Hillary thinks this is okay. But I really
wonder... what kind of presidential candidate would brag about
putting thousands of Americans out of work?
We have to stand strong against this abuse of
authority and frankly offensive rhetoric.
I have seen the look on the faces of hard
working people in this country who very much want to work, who
are being laid off because of President Obama's war on coal. I've
personally witnessed the harmful effects of these disastrous,
abusive regulations.
And let me tell you, if Hillary Clinton
thinks she's going to one-up Obama's vendetta against coal, she's
got another thing coming.
I will not back down while the Democrats
continue their war on coal and jobs. I will stand strong for coal
and for American business.
Will you stand with me by signing my petition
today to defend coal and save jobs?

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

body:
Dear Friend,

Donald Trump has refused to debate Ted Cruz in Des Moines, he
skipped his appearance at CPAC, and now he's ducking the debate
next week in Utah. He scared to debate Ted Cruz because Donald is
unprepared to be President of the United States and he doesn't
want voters to be reminded of his lifetime record of supporting
Democratic candidates and their liberal agenda.
Donald's
self-proclaimed "flexibility" on issues such as Israel, Iran, and
amnesty, is exactly why he is afraid to face Ted, a consistent
conservative who never forgets the people he works for or the
constitutional principles he upholds.
Since #DuckingDonald
prefers to duck debates with Ted Cruz, we're offering to take the
debate to him next Monday in Washington, DC, when Ted speaks at
AIPAC following Mr. Trump.

Best,

Alice Stewart
Communications
Director

ReformingAmerica and loving it: Here are some MAJOR victories that you, the grassroots army, accomplished last week. With all the crazy in the world, this is what you helped get done on the state level:

1. $1.036 billion, with a "B": The Florida chapter has been able to pick up where we left off last year and has continued to rack up significant policy victories in Tallahassee this year. Our grassroots efforts have led to key wins in education, health care, and economic development policy in Florida.

2. BOOM! AFP-Indiana for the win: The vote on HB 1001, a road funding bill, took place last Thursday night and passed easily. The final version of the bill does not include any direct tax increases. Both the gasoline tax and cigarette tax ($1/pack) increases were removed thanks to the hard work of AFP activists.
http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=957cf57cf08592d41263c02d37d17b2c1c6c8002c83b043adda1baeeaf10170e2f250cf76bc01c10

3. Gettin' business done in Columbia: Let's make one thing clear: the only reason a gas tax hike is off the table for now is because of the thousands of citizens in this state that are putting pressure on their legislators in South Carolina. Undoubtedly, our activists have changed the trajectory of how business is done in Columbia.
http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=957cf57cf08592d4803b09922147f1d05d6aaaee88d538e52ad3426b11ff48bb68a0a5335885e20c
http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=957cf57cf08592d4803b09922147f1d05d6aaaee88d538e52ad3426b11ff48bb68a0a5335885e20c

http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=957cf57cf08592d4da552fcd67a363b7d63b5c1df90e81a4de7cd30f07f57a92a96985d079a7803a
@AFP_Utah ) engaged thousands of its grass roots activists across the state to oppose the legislation.

5. West Virginia moves mountains: 60% of West Virginians believe that union membership should be a choice and through last month's override the legislature has ensured we have that freedom, by making West Virginia the nation's 26th right-to-work state. We applaud their swift response to the governor's veto and we are excited for the opportunities that have been created for the Mountain State.
http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=957cf57cf08592d4a88f468583c798408d97ca0a7df48b760cc265272abc403ee1b69bd2ad812193
http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=957cf57cf08592d4a88f468583c798408d97ca0a7df48b760cc265272abc403ee1b69bd2ad812193

Next News Cycle: Did we invent this awesome feeling of victory you have right now? No. Are we carrying this massive momentum into the rest of 2016? You bet! With your help, Americans for Prosperity is forging ahead with new victories on the horizon:

1. "Show me the Veto...proof majority.": After months of educating Missouri voters and mobilizing hundreds of activists to contact legislators, AFP is proud to congratulate the Show-Me State for sending paycheck protection legislation to the governor's desk with a veto-proof majority.
http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=957cf57cf08592d42c24b59765b57251ab201dc556d6ba4cb83a503be6e13952b57abb8a703d1a1e
http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=957cf57cf08592d42c24b59765b57251ab201dc556d6ba4cb83a503be6e13952b57abb8a703d1a1e

The news by the numbers: With a grassroots army like this, you can't help but have impressive numbers.

- 5.7 million calls made already in 2016
- 2.8 million activists STRONG!
- 406,000 doors knocked already in 2016
- 35 state chapters

I know what you're thinking: "how do I get aboard this wild wave of success?" Glad you asked.

Join AFP THIS SATURDAY, MARCH 19th, 2016 for a NATIONAL DAY OF ACTION!

Click
http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=957cf57cf08592d46c30be4bcfd43ab73f4a55fd38e3171bfa1574c5b1c20f3b02dd266b710003c7
here to find the closest Day of Action to you!

In Liberty,

Luke Hilgemann

Americans for Prosperity

subject: Do your job, Pat
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171944e/3476a20e/c657e6c/2745ad14/267643444/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, Yesterday, President Obama announced his nomination for the Supreme Court - and Pat Toomey announced he wouldn't even consider the nomination. Instead, **Toomey said he wants to "ensure that it is the next president, not the current president" who fills the vacancy - over 10 months from now. ** | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171944e/3476a20e/c657e6c/2745ad13/267643444/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0317FBb1")
---
Peter, filling a Supreme Court vacancy is about more than politics - it's about the foundation of our democratic government. But Toomey wants to keep the seat vacant until 2017 for political reasons.
**Consider this: if Toomey gets his way, our next president may be Donald Trump._That means one of President Trump 's first actions would be choosing a lifetime appointment to the highest Court in the country. _**
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171944e/3476a20e/c657e6c/2745ad12/267643444/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0317FBb2")
---
People have lost trust in government because of the overtly partisan machinations of obstructionists like Pat Toomey, who is _**unwilling to do his job**_ in even considering the President's nomination.
I'm running to restore trust in government by bringing accountable leadership to the Senate. I actually want to be accountable to the people above politics and be judged not for my intentions but by my deeds. And because of that message, the most recent polling has me within the margin of error against Toomey.
[Please contribute today to elect a Senator who will not only do his job, but be accountable to the people.](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171944e/3476a20e/c657e6c/2745ad11/267643444/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0317FBp1")

---
Warmly,
Joe

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Your response since Tuesday
body:
#
No one ever said a political revolution would be easy.
But we must remember that the struggle for our rights is not the struggle of a day, or a year, or a generation. It is the struggle of a lifetime, and one that must be fought each and every generation. Today, it is our turn to fight.
The billionaire class and political establishment in this country would like very much for us to go away. They see our proposals and the way we fund our campaign as a threat to their existence and have been determined to see us lose from day one.
But the response from supporters across the country has made one thing clear: we aren't going anywhere -- we are going to win.
Since the polls opened on Tuesday, we have received more than 100,000 contributions and raised almost $3 million dollars. So we've set a goal that will give us the resources we need to win all three primaries and caucuses next Tuesday:
[**Make a $3 contribution to our campaign and help us raise $5 million in online small-dollar contributions from working Americans by midnight tonight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-5m-goal?refcode=em160317s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-5m-goal?refcode=em160317s1-full")
We are less than halfway through this Democratic primary and expect to do very well in the states to come. There are a lot of delegates left to be won: four states alone hold more delegates than Secretary Clinton has in total today.
Are we underdogs? For sure. But we have been underdogs from the beginning of this campaign. And the people powering our campaign, the people working longer and longer hours for lower wages, the sick without health care, and the students staring at the prospect of crushing debt, are underdogs as well.
But if we continue to stand together, we are going to keep chipping away at Hillary Clinton's lead until we overtake her on June 7th.
That's why I have to ask you directly:
[**Can I count on you to make a $3 contribution to our campaign and help us raise $5 million in online small-dollar contributions from working Americans by midnight tonight?**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-5m-goal?refcode=em160317s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-5m-goal?refcode=em160317s1-full")
The economic and political systems of this country are stacked against ordinary Americans. But we are fighting back through our campaign, and we can win.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-5m-goal?refcode=em160317s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-5m-goal?refcode=em160317s1-full")**

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). name: SCOTUS Update
subject: THIS → THAT
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:

---
Friend --

**_FIRST_** , President Obama nominated Merrick Garland -- a highly qualified judge on the U.S. Court of Appeals with decades of experience -- to fill the new Supreme Court vacancy.

**_THEN_** , Senator Pat Toomey went on the record saying he "**would be happy to carefully consider his nomination " \-- but only if Garland is nominated by the next president.**

**_NOW_** , we're counting on you to END Pat Toomey's hyper-partisan obstruction and ensure Democrats take back our Senate majority.

[**RUSH $5 or whatever you can now to defeat Toomey and flip the Senate back to blue. Every grassroots donation counts.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3559100331449122816/4603263759358623744?refcode=e20160317&refcode2=e20160317nd&amount=25)

body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
Here is what Bernie Sanders and Hillary Clinton are doing today:
* Hillary Clinton is attending a fundraiser in Tennessee, a state that already voted, to collect checks from high-dollar donors who are bundling as much as $27,000.

* Bernie Sanders is holding a town hall with voters in Arizona to talk about the issues that matter.

What about tomorrow?
* Hillary Clinton is attending a fundraiser in Virginia, another state that already voted, to collect more checks from high-dollar donors who are also bundling as much as $27,000.

* Bernie Sanders is holding three rallies with voters, one in each of the states that vote or caucus on Tuesday -- Idaho, Utah, and Arizona.

**This is only possible because YOU are Bernie's donors.** No millionaires or billionaires to bundle money from their rich friends. Just you, .
That's why we set a goal of raising $5 million by the end of the day today. So long as you're with us, Bernie can keep talking to voters to build our political revolution.

When we send these emails, it's because only through donations from you is Bernie able to do the hard work necessary to talk to voters and win.
And when voters hear Bernie's message in town halls and rallies, they come to his side -- and stay there.
**You** are our advantage. **You** are the reason Bernie has done so well against the political establishment and its super PACs. And **you** are the way that Bernie can win.
[**Rush your $3 contribution to Bernie now and help us reach our goal of $5 million raised between Tuesday and midnight tonight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-5m-goal?refcode=em160317s2-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-5m-goal?refcode=em160317s2-full")

In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
